zh.lifeSummary: 當Helisant De Bohun於1249年出生在英國米德萊可倫敦時，她的父親Humphrey de Bohun V26歲，母親Eleanor de Braose21歲。她和Matthew II de Louvain of Little Easton至少有1個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1291年7月11日在英國英格蘭艾可蕾托 伊斯頓享年42歲。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bohun
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Moon
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Moyon in La Manche. Compare   Mounce  .
Americanized form of German   Mohn   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Helisant De Bohun was born in 1249, in London, Middlesex, England, her father, Humphrey de Bohun V, was 26 and her mother, Eleanor de Braose, was 21. She had at least 1 son and 3 daughters with Matthew II de Louvain of Little Easton. She died on 11 July 1291, in Little Easton, Essex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Helisant De Bohun est née en 1249, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, son père, Humphrey de Bohun V, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Eleanor de Braose, avait 21 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles avec Matthew II de Louvain of Little Easton. Elle est décédée le 11 juillet 1291, à Little Easton, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Helisant De Bohun 1249 in London, Middlesex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Humphrey de Bohun V 26 und ihre Mutter Eleanor de Braose 21. Sie hatte mit Matthew II de Louvain of Little Easton mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 11. Juli 1291 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Little Easton, Essex, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Helisant De Bohunが1249年にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンで生まれた時，父Humphrey de Bohun Vは26歳，母Eleanor de Braoseは21歳であった。彼女はMatthew II de Louvain of Little Eastonとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1291年7月11日にイギリスイギリスエセックスリットル エアストンで42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Helisant De Bohun(이)가 1249년 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Humphrey de Bohun V(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eleanor de Braose(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 Matthew II de Louvain of Little Easton(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1291년 7월 11일 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 리틀 이스트에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.
